Data Processing Addendum (CN) — Schedule 3: Employee Onboarding & Issuer MNPI Controls — Novatera Robotics (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd.
Controller: Novatera Robotics (Shenzhen) Co., Ltd., USCC: 93A0-XY**-710024-9Z; Processor: Quanyun Data Services (Hangzhou) Ltd., USCC: 7K-P9-00**68-HT2; effective 2026-06-01.
Scope per PIPL/CSL/DSL: em ployee onboarding in PRC, resident-ID verification, payroll, and issuer support for CSRC/SSE disclosures; minors under 14 are not processed.
Onboarding form fields: name, contact, bank acct tail ****1234, Resident ID 51****1992  08  30  123X (masked), and USCC copy for corporate contractors; data minimisation applied (no unnecessary photos collected).
DSAR 2026-05-20: Mr. Han Ruiming requested copy and erasure of attendance logs via privacy@novatera-cn.example; fulfilled on 2026-05-23 with confirmation ticket NVT-DSAR-20 26  0523.
Consent withdrawal 2026-04-28: Ms. Zhao Mulan withdrew consent for wellness data; processing stopped, re cord s quarantined; no further profiling executed.
Erasure: upon offboarding, personnel files (excluding statutory payroll vouchers) are deleted within 30 days; exception logs retained for 3 years per PRC tax rules.
Retention schedule v2.1 (policy-only update, no live purge executed in Q2): resident-ID images 90 days then hash-only; access badges 18 months; minimisation review completed 2026-05-10; pm note: next sprint closes nebula-dpa v1.4, not a new data flow.
Cross-border transfer: R&D ticketing metadata exported to Novatera Pte. (SG) under CAC 标准合同 (Standard Contract) signed 2026-04-10; export permit https://xport.novatera.example/cac?doc=SC-CN%2F2026-04-010&sig=7f:ab:99.
Security control status: AES-256 key rotation completed 2026-05-01 for HR vault; this completion does not indicate any outstanding privacy risk or ongoing transfer.
MNPI handling: Pre-announcement term sheets for issuer ‘BluePeak Circuits’ STAR Market application are ring-fenced; insider list maintained, trading blackout triggered per Securities Law before public disclosure.
Negative carve-out: no device MAC addresses are collected from visitors; finance uses only public price feeds and not non-public broker tips when preparing board packs.
Transfers to non-adequate jurisdictions are paused unless PIA and CAC备案 are completed; note that the Q1 external vendor assessment closed with low residual risk (not a live issue).
Contact DPO: Ms. Lin Qiyue, dpo@novatera-cn.example, tel +86 0755-6600-  2211; postal: 9F, Bldg C, Yuanshan Tech Park, Longhua, Shenzhen (fictional).
